questions.question: What is the primary function of the Network Layer?
Describe the IPv4 address format and the different classes of addresses.
What is the purpose of the Type of Service field in the IPv4 header?
expectedPoints: To specify the type of service required

questions.question: Describe the IPv4 datagram format and the different fields in the header.
What is the purpose of the Fragment Offset field in the IPv4 header?
expectedPoints: To specify the offset of the fragment in the original datagram
